repo_signals: L3 smoke for hardware.protocols: I2C addressing and clock stretching, SPI modes and chip select, UART framing and baud, CAN arbitration, USB enumeration, PCIe lanes and TLP
fix a React useEffect dependency array bug

retrieval_query: i2c address ack clock stretching spi mode chip select uart baud framing can arbitration usb enumeration pcie lane tlp

validation_smoke.name: hardware.protocols L3 validation smoke
signals: a logic-analyzer capture shows the expected start, address, ack, and stop phases on the I2C bus
the SPI clock polarity and phase match the peripheral datasheet and data lands on the correct edge
UART framing matches the configured baud, parity, and stop bits with no framing errors counted
USB enumeration completes through address assignment and configuration without descriptor request retries

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.protocols diagnosis smoke
signals: a missing I2C ACK points to a wrong device address or a peripheral held in reset
garbled UART characters that worsen at higher baud indicate a clock or baud-rate mismatch
SPI data shifted by one bit reveals a clock-polarity or phase mode mismatch
repeated CAN error frames suggest bit-timing misconfiguration or bus-off from acknowledgement loss
a USB device that fails enumeration after reset implies a malformed or unanswered descriptor request
